pitchSequence.description: Fisted foul ball off to the right
Hard grounder to third. Patterson handles it and fires to first in time to retire De Jesus for the first out of the inning

notes: 4-pitch AB, groundout 5-3. Count was 2-1 when put in play. Switch hitter vs RHP Padolina. De Jesus 0-for-3 entering this AB.

pitchSequence.description: Line drive base hit into shallow right. And Colbert is aboard with a one-out single

notes: 1-pitch AB, single on first pitch to shallow right. Switch hitter vs RHP Padolina. Colbert 2-for-3 entering this AB.

pitchSequence.description: Chopped foul down the third base line
Fastball called strike three at the knee

notes: 4-pitch AB, strikeout looking. Count was 1-2 when struck out. Switch hitter vs RHP Padolina. Runner stays at first.

pitchSequence.description: Chopped foul and out of play
Tapper back to the mound. Padolina scoops it up and fires to first to retire Sunderland to end the ballgame

notes: 3-pitch AB, groundout 1-3. Count was 0-2 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Sunderland 0-for-4. Final out of the game. Cadillac Cars win 8-2. Padolina completes the game.
